en_title: GTA Online Is Adding a Massive New Heist in July, to Keep You Busy Until GTA 6 Arrives
subtitle: 抢美术馆等《GTA6》
opus_summary: 《GTA Online》7月将推出大型劫案更新，玩家可洗劫科茨中心美术馆，需拥有豪宅才能参与。GTA+会员可享200万美元(约合人民币1352万元)折扣。

paragraphs.en: GTA Online is getting its next big update in just a few weeks.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA Online》将在几周后迎来下一次大型更新。

paragraphs.en: The new update, known as The Kortz Center Heist, will let players ransack Los Santos' most prestigious art gallery. The building has been in GTA 5 since launch, but has largely been unused for any significant content outside of a standoff between various law enforcement agencies in the story mode. It's never had an accessible interior, and there's not much reason to go visit it, but that will all change in July.
paragraphs.cn: 这次名为「科茨中心劫案」的更新将允许玩家洗劫洛圣都最负盛名的美术馆。这座建筑自《GTA5》发售起就存在，但除了剧情模式中执法机构间的对峙外，几乎没有用于任何重要内容。它从未拥有过可进入的室内，也没什么前往参观的理由，但这一切都将在7月改变。

paragraphs.en: If it's anything like other GTA Online updates, this will likely be quite expansive and feature new vehicles, weapons, clothing, and potentially, gameplay mechanics. Previous heists are also highly replayable thanks to different approaches, which allow you to take on these high-risk jobs in a wide variety of ways. Details are still scarce on what exactly the update will feature beyond this heist, but Rockstar will likely give fans a rundown a few days before it launches.
paragraphs.cn: 如果这次更新与其它《GTA Online》更新类似，那么可能会很庞大，并包含新载具、武器、服装，甚至可能涉及玩法机制。得益于多种不同方式，此前的抢劫任务也具有很高的重复可玩性，让你能通过多种方式完成这些高风险任务。目前除了此次抢劫，更新的具体内容细节仍然很少，但Rockstar可能会在更新上线前几天向玩家们详细介绍。

paragraphs.en: Fans may also want to start preparing, as you'll need a fair bit of money and assets to partake in this heist. Players will need to own one of the mansions that were added in the last major GTA Online update , as the mansion's art studio will be renovated into a heist planning room. If you don't have a mansion yet or you're broke, Rockstar will be offering ways to earn bonus GTA$ in the coming weeks. Additionally, GTA+ members will be able to get a $2 million discount on the mansions very soon.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家们可能也想提前准备，因为参与这次抢劫需要相当多的资金和资产。你需要拥有上一次《GTA Online》重大更新中加入的豪宅之一，因为豪宅中的艺术工作室将被改造成抢劫策划室。如果你还没有豪宅或者手头拮据，Rockstar将在未来几周提供赚取额外GTA游戏币的途径。此外，GTA+会员很快就能以200万美元(约合人民币1352万元)的折扣价购入这些豪宅。

paragraphs.en: Finally, if you're still playing the Xbox One or PS4 versions of GTA Online, Rockstar is giving you a free upgrade to the current-gen versions of the game . All in all, it seems like a perfect time to jump back into GTA Online if you've played it before, especially as anticipation builds for GTA 6's release this November .
paragraphs.cn: 最后，如果你还在玩Xbox One或PS4版《GTA Online》，Rockstar将为你提供免费升级至本世代游戏版本的机会。总的来说，如果你之前玩过《GTA Online》，现在似乎是回归的绝佳时机，特别是随着人们对今年11月《GTA6》发售的期待日益高涨。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的一名自由撰稿人，负责报道游戏、电影等各类娱乐内容。你可以在X上找到他：@Cade_Onder。
